data.raceComments: {"comment":"3. LOCO BLAZE jumped from out wide and was game in defeat last start when a 1.75 lengths second (20.26) behind Zipping Kimeli at this track. One of the leading chances. 7. PARTY WITH TOM has a strong record this trip with four wins and three placings from 11 starts. Missed the frame latest (20.41) when sixth over 366m at this track in a Grade 5. Looks a key chance on best figures. 1. GLASS BULLET turned in a modest effort most recently when sixth at Q Straight over 300m behind Force (17.28) in a P5. Key runner on best form. 2. THREE GIRLS is worth another chance despite missing the top-three here most recently.","runners":[3,7,1,2],"exclusive":false}
